mapper.select: SELECT BOOK_ID AS bookId, TITLE AS title, AUTHOR AS author, PUBLISHER AS publisher, STATUS AS status, CATEGORY AS category FROM BOOK ORDER BY BOOK_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOOK (TITLE, AUTHOR, PUBLISHER, STATUS, CATEGORY) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{status}, #{category})
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK SET STATUS=#{status} WHERE BOOK_ID=#{bookId}
mapper.select:
SELECT BOOK_ID AS bookId, TITLE AS title, AUTHOR AS author, PUBLISHER AS publisher, STATUS AS status, CATEGORY AS category FROM BOOK
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND AUTHOR LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND PUBLISHER LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
AND CATEGORY = #{category} AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT(#{initial},'%') AND STATUS = #{statusFilter}
ORDER BY TITLE ASC
ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOAN L WHERE L.BOOK_ID = BOOK.BOOK_ID) DESC, TITLE ASC
ORDER BY TITLE ASC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT BOOK_ID AS bookId, TITLE AS title, AUTHOR AS author, PUBLISHER AS publisher, STATUS AS status, CATEGORY AS category FROM BOOK WHERE TITLE = #{title} LIMIT 1
